{{基礎情報 公家 | 氏名 = 久志宇賀主命 | 画像 = | 画像サイズ = | 画像説明 = | 時代 = [[古墳時代]] | 生誕 = 不明 | 死没 = 不明 | 改名 = | 別名 = 探湯主命、中臣連祖探湯主 | 諡号 = | 神号 = | 戒名 = | 墓所 = | 官位 = | 主君 = [[垂仁天皇]] | 氏族 = [[中臣氏]] | 父母 = 父：[[神聞勝命]]、母：[[美加々比売命]] | 兄弟 = [[伊己呂比命]] | 妻 = [[大水口比売命]] | 子 = [[国摩大鹿島命]]、[[稲津媛命]] | 特記事項 = }} '''久志宇賀主命'''（くしうかぬしのみこと）は、[[古墳時代]]の[[豪族]]・'''[[中臣氏]]'''の祖。'''探湯主命'''（くかぬしのみと）とも。
== 概要 == 『[[日本書紀]]』の[[垂仁天皇|垂仁紀]]二十六年三月条の割注記事には、天皇が中臣連祖探湯主に対し誰に[[倭大国魂神|大倭大神]]を祀らせるべきか占わせたところ、[[渟名城入姫命]]が適任と出たとされる。
== 系譜 == 父は[[神聞勝命]]、母は[[伊豆国造]]の祖・波刈禰命の娘である美加々比売命で、[[穂積氏|穂積臣]]の祖・[[伊香色雄命]]の娘である大水口比売命を娶って、[[国摩大鹿島命]]と[[彦太忍信命]]の妻である稲津媛命を生んだとされる<ref>[[中田憲信]]「赤堀」『諸系譜』第三冊。</ref><ref>中田憲信「青木」『諸系譜』第三冊。</ref><ref>[[鈴木真年]]「中臣氏総系」『諸系譜』第三冊。</ref>。
一方「十市部首」系図では大水口比売命は[[大水口宿禰]]の妹とされ、内色許男命と新河小楯媛命の子とされる<ref>中田憲信「十市部首」『諸系譜』第一冊。</ref>。
久志宇賀主命は[[国摩大鹿島命]]と同じ[[垂仁天皇|垂仁朝]]の人物とされ、これに従えば大鹿島命とは同時代の人物となる。また久志宇賀主命の別名を探湯主命ともいい、この[[探湯]]の名は託宣の名を持つ神聞勝命にも通じる。これらの理由から久志宇賀主命が実際には神聞勝命か大鹿島命のどちらかと同一人物と考えられる。その場合、大鹿島命の実際の父は神聞勝命、母は伊豆国造の娘である美加々比売命と見られる。しかし神聞勝命と久志宇賀主命は早くに別人化したものと見られ、『[[新撰姓氏録]]』では同人説と別人説の二種類の世系が記載されている<ref>宝賀寿男「二 中臣氏の初期段階ー占部と中臣氏の祖先たち」『古代氏族の研究⑤ 中臣氏 卜占を担った古代占部の後裔』青垣出版、2014年、28-35頁。</ref>。
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
== 関連項目 == *[[卜部]] *[[占部氏]]

== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
== 関連項目 == *[[卜部]] *[[占部氏]]
{{デフォルトソート:くしうかぬしのみこと}} [[Category:古墳時代の人物]] [[Category:中臣氏]] [[Category:生没年不詳]]

revision.text:
{{Infobox noble | name = Kushiukanushi no Mikoto | image = | image_size = | caption = | era = [[Kofun period]] | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | other_names = Sagayuushi no Mikoto, Nakatomi no Muraji no Sagayuushi | honorary_title = | deity_name = | posthumous_name = | burial_place = | rank = | lord = [[Emperor Suinin]] | clan = {{ill|Nakatomi clan|ja|中臣氏}} | parents = Father: {{ill|Kamikikatsu no Mikoto|ja|神聞勝命}} | children = {{ill|Kuninazu no Ōkashima no Mikoto|ja|国摩大鹿島命}} }}
'''Kushiukanushi no Mikoto''' (久志宇賀主命) was an ancient Japanese noble and an ancestor of the {{ill|Nakatomi clan|ja|中臣氏}}.
== Overview == In the *{{ill|Nihon Shoki|ja|日本書紀}}*, during the reign of {{ill|Emperor Suinin|ja|垂仁天皇}}, an entry in the 26th year of the emperor’s reign notes that the emperor consulted Kushiukanushi no Mikoto (referred to as the ancestor of the Nakatomi clan) about whom should conduct the worship of {{ill|Ōyamato no Ōkami|ja|倭大国魂神}}. The divination revealed that {{ill|Nunakiiri-hime no Mikoto|ja|渟名城入姫命}} was the most suitable for this role.
== Genealogy == Kushiukanushi no Mikoto is identified as the son of {{ill|Kamikikatsu no Mikoto|ja|神聞勝命}} and the father of {{ill|Kuninazu no Ōkashima no Mikoto|ja|国摩大鹿島命}} according to genealogical records.<ref>『{{ill|Sonpi Bunmyaku|ja|尊卑分脈}}』</ref>
== References == {{Reflist}}

{{Infobox noble | name = Kushiukanushi no Mikoto | image = | image_size = | caption = | era = [[Kofun period]] | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | other_names = Sagayuushi no Mikoto, Nakatomi no Muraji no Sagayuushi | honorary_title = | deity_name = | posthumous_name = | burial_place = | rank = | lord = [[Emperor Suinin]] | clan = {{ill|Nakatomi clan|ja|中臣氏}} | parents = Father: {{ill|Kamikikatsu no Mikoto|ja|神聞勝命}} | children = {{ill|Kuninazu no Ōkashima no Mikoto|ja|国摩大鹿島命}} }}
'''Kushiukanushi no Mikoto''' (久志宇賀主命) was an ancient Japanese noble and an ancestor of the {{ill|Nakatomi clan|ja|中臣氏}}.
== Overview == In the *{{ill|Nihon Shoki|ja|日本書紀}}*, during the reign of {{ill|Emperor Suinin|ja|垂仁天皇}}, an entry in the 26th year of the emperor’s reign notes that the emperor consulted Kushiukanushi no Mikoto (referred to as the ancestor of the Nakatomi clan) about whom should conduct the worship of {{ill|Ōyamato no Ōkami|ja|倭大国魂神}}. The divination revealed that {{ill|Nunakiiri-hime no Mikoto|ja|渟名城入姫命}} was the most suitable for this role.
== Genealogy == Kushiukanushi no Mikoto is identified as the son of {{ill|Kamikikatsu no Mikoto|ja|神聞勝命}} and the father of {{ill|Kuninazu no Ōkashima no Mikoto|ja|国摩大鹿島命}} according to genealogical records.<ref>『{{ill|Sonpi Bunmyaku|ja|尊卑分脈}}』</ref>
== References == {{Reflist}}
== Related Articles == *[[:en:Radical 25|Radical 25]] *{{Interlanguage link|Urabe clan|lt=Urabe clan|ja|卜部氏|en|draft:Yoshida family|simple|User:Immanuelle/Urabe_clan|fr|clan Urabe}}

revision.text:
{{Infobox noble | name = Kushiukanushi no Mikoto | image = | image_size = | caption = | era = [[Kofun period]] | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | other_names = Sagayuushi no Mikoto, Nakatomi no Muraji no Sagayuushi | honorary_title = | deity_name = | posthumous_name = | burial_place = | rank = | lord = [[Emperor Suinin]] | clan = {{ill|Nakatomi clan|ja|中臣氏}} | parents = Father: {{ill|Kamikikatsu no Mikoto|ja|神聞勝命}} | children = {{ill|Kuninazu no Ōkashima no Mikoto|ja|国摩大鹿島命}} }}
'''Kushiukanushi no Mikoto''' (久志宇賀主命) was an ancient Japanese noble and an ancestor of the {{ill|Nakatomi clan|ja|中臣氏}}.
== Overview == In the *{{ill|Nihon Shoki|ja|日本書紀}}*, during the reign of {{ill|Emperor Suinin|ja|垂仁天皇}}, an entry in the 26th year of the emperor’s reign notes that the emperor consulted Kushiukanushi no Mikoto (referred to as the ancestor of the Nakatomi clan) about whom should conduct the worship of {{ill|Ōyamato no Ōkami|ja|倭大国魂神}}. The divination revealed that {{ill|Nunakiiri-hime no Mikoto|ja|渟名城入姫命}} was the most suitable for this role.
== Genealogy == Kushiukanushi no Mikoto is identified as the son of {{ill|Kamikikatsu no Mikoto|ja|神聞勝命}} and the father of {{ill|Kuninazu no Ōkashima no Mikoto|ja|国摩大鹿島命}} according to genealogical records.<ref>『{{ill|Sonpi Bunmyaku|ja|尊卑分脈}}』</ref>
== References == {{Reflist}}
== Related Articles == *[[:en:Radical 25|Radical 25]] *{{Interlanguage link|12=draft|Urabe clan|lt=Urabe clan|ja|卜部氏|en|draft:Yoshida family|simple|User:Immanuelle/Urabe_clan|fr|clan Urabe}}

11 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:久志宇賀主命 up to rev 91088283
revision.text:
{{基礎情報 公家 | 氏名 = 久志宇賀主命 | 画像 = | 画像サイズ = | 画像説明 = | 時代 = [[古墳時代]] | 生誕 = 不明 | 死没 = 不明 | 改名 = | 別名 = 探湯主命、中臣連祖探湯主 | 諡号 = | 神号 = | 戒名 = | 墓所 = | 官位 = | 主君 = [[垂仁天皇]] | 氏族 = [[中臣氏]] | 父母 = 父：[[神聞勝命]] | 子 = [[国摩大鹿島命]] | 特記事項 = }} '''久志宇賀主命'''（くしうかぬしのみこと）は、[[古墳時代]]の[[豪族]]・'''[[中臣氏]]'''の祖。
== 概要 == 『[[日本書紀]]』の[[垂仁天皇|垂仁紀]]二十六年三月条の割注記事には、天皇が中臣連祖探湯主に対し誰に[[倭大国魂神|大倭大神]]を祀らせるべきか占わせたところ、[[渟名城入姫命]]が適任と出たとされる。
== 系譜 == 父は[[神聞勝命]]で、子に[[国摩大鹿島命]]がいるとされる<ref>『[[尊卑分脈]]』</ref>。
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
== 関連項目 == *[[卜部]] *[[占部氏]]
{{デフォルトソート:くしうかぬしのみこと}} [[Category:古墳時代の人物]] [[Category:中臣氏]] [[Category:生没年不詳]]

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[久志宇賀主命]] to [[Kushiukameshi no Mikoto]] without leaving a redirect: Bot: merge import
revision.text:
{{基礎情報 公家 | 氏名 = 久志宇賀主命 | 画像 = | 画像サイズ = | 画像説明 = | 時代 = [[古墳時代]] | 生誕 = 不明 | 死没 = 不明 | 改名 = | 別名 = 探湯主命、中臣連祖探湯主 | 諡号 = | 神号 = | 戒名 = | 墓所 = | 官位 = | 主君 = [[垂仁天皇]] | 氏族 = [[中臣氏]] | 父母 = 父：[[神聞勝命]] | 子 = [[国摩大鹿島命]] | 特記事項 = }} '''久志宇賀主命'''（くしうかぬしのみこと）は、[[古墳時代]]の[[豪族]]・'''[[中臣氏]]'''の祖。
== 概要 == 『[[日本書紀]]』の[[垂仁天皇|垂仁紀]]二十六年三月条の割注記事には、天皇が中臣連祖探湯主に対し誰に[[倭大国魂神|大倭大神]]を祀らせるべきか占わせたところ、[[渟名城入姫命]]が適任と出たとされる。
== 系譜 == 父は[[神聞勝命]]で、子に[[国摩大鹿島命]]がいるとされる<ref>『[[尊卑分脈]]』</ref>。
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
== 関連項目 == *[[卜部]] *[[占部氏]]
{{デフォルトソート:くしうかぬしのみこと}} [[Category:古墳時代の人物]] [[Category:中臣氏]] [[Category:生没年不詳]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:久志宇賀主命]] {{Infobox person|gender={{ill|male|qid=Q6581097}}|spouse={{ill|Q106107729|qid=Q106107729}}|children={{ill|Kuninazu no oukashima|qid=Q99517269}}; {{ill|Q106107899|qid=Q106107899}}|father={{ill|Kamikikikatsu|qid=Q106106971}}|mother={{ill|Q106107417|qid=Q106107417}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q106106958]] Wikidata name: Kushiukameshi no Mikoto [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 07:46, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox noble | name = Kushiukanushi no Mikoto | image = | image_size = | caption = | era = [[Kofun period]] | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | other_names = Sagayuushi no Mikoto, Nakatomi no Muraji no Sagayuushi | honorary_title = | deity_name = | posthumous_name = | burial_place = | Rank = | lord = [[Emperor Suinin]] | clan = [[:en:Nakatomi clan|Nakatomi clan]] | parents = Father: {{ill|Kamikikatsu no Mikoto|ja|神聞勝命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamikikatsu no Mikoto|qq=|1=Kamikikikatsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q106106971}} | children = {{ill|Kuninazu no Ōkashima no Mikoto|ja|国摩大鹿島命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuninazu no Ōkashima no Mikoto|qq=}} }}
'''Kushiukanushi no Mikoto''' (久志宇賀主命) was an ancient Japanese noble and an ancestor of the [[:en:Nakatomi clan|Nakatomi clan]].
== Overview == In the *[[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]]*, during the reign of [[:en:Emperor Suinin|Emperor Suinin]], an entry in the 26th year of the emperor’s reign notes that the emperor consulted Kushiukanushi no Mikoto (referred to as the ancestor of the Nakatomi clan) about whom should conduct the worship of [[:en:Yamato Okunitama|Ōyamato no Ōkami]]. The divination revealed that {{ill|Nunaki-iri-hime|lt=Nunaki-iri-hime|lt=Nunakiiri-hime no Mikoto|ja|渟名城入姫命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nunakiiri-hime no Mikoto|qq=}} was the most suitable for this role.
== Genealogy == Kushiukanushi no Mikoto is identified as the son of {{ill|Kamikikatsu no Mikoto|ja|神聞勝命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamikikatsu no Mikoto|qq=|1=Kamikikikatsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q106106971}} and the father of {{ill|Kuninazu no Ōkashima no Mikoto|ja|国摩大鹿島命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuninazu no Ōkashima no Mikoto|qq=}} according to genealogical records.<ref>『[[:en:Sonpi Bunmyaku|Sonpi Bunmyaku]]』</ref>
== References == {{Reflist}}
== Related Articles == *[[:en:Radical 25|Radical 25]] *{{ill|Urabe clan|lt=Urabe clan|ja|卜部氏|en|draft:Yoshida family|simple|User:Immanuelle/Urabe_clan|fr|clan Urabe|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Urabe clan|qq=}}
{{translated page|ja|久志宇賀主命|version=91088283|comment=Imported full ja history}}
{{draft categories| [[Category:Completion tier 2]]
[[Category:Nakatomi clan]] [[Category:Year of birth unknown]]
}}

'''Kushiukanushi no Mikoto''' (久志宇賀主命) was an ancient Japanese noble and an ancestor of the [[:en:Nakatomi clan|Nakatomi clan]].
== Overview == In the *[[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]]*, during the reign of [[:en:Emperor Suinin|Emperor Suinin]], an entry in the 26th year of the emperor’s reign notes that the emperor consulted Kushiukanushi no Mikoto (referred to as the ancestor of the Nakatomi clan) about whom should conduct the worship of [[:en:Yamato Okunitama|Ōyamato no Ōkami]]. The divination revealed that {{ill|Nunaki-iri-hime|lt=Nunaki-iri-hime|lt=Nunakiiri-hime no Mikoto|ja|渟名城入姫命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nunakiiri-hime no Mikoto|qq=}} was the most suitable for this role.
== Genealogy == Kushiukanushi no Mikoto is identified as the son of {{ill|Kamikikatsu no Mikoto|ja|神聞勝命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamikikatsu no Mikoto|1=Kamikikikatsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q106106971}} and the father of {{ill|Kuninazu no Ōkashima no Mikoto|ja|国摩大鹿島命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuninazu no Ōkashima no Mikoto|qq=}} according to genealogical records.<ref>『[[:en:Sonpi Bunmyaku|Sonpi Bunmyaku]]』</ref>
== References == {{Reflist}}
== Related Articles == *[[:en:Radical 25|Radical 25]] *{{ill|Urabe clan|lt=Urabe clan|ja|卜部氏|en|draft:Yoshida family|simple|User:Immanuelle/Urabe_clan|fr|clan Urabe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Urabe clan|qq=}}
{{translated page|ja|久志宇賀主命|version=91088283|comment=Imported full ja history}}

'''Kushiukanushi no Mikoto''' (久志宇賀主命) was an ancient Japanese noble and an ancestor of the [[:en:Nakatomi clan|Nakatomi clan]].
== Overview == In the *[[:en:Nihon Shoki|Nihon Shoki]]*, during the reign of [[:en:Emperor Suinin|Emperor Suinin]], an entry in the 26th year of the emperor’s reign notes that the emperor consulted Kushiukanushi no Mikoto (referred to as the ancestor of the Nakatomi clan) about whom should conduct the worship of [[:en:Yamato Okunitama|Ōyamato no Ōkami]]. The divination revealed that {{ill|Nunaki-iri-hime|lt=Nunaki-iri-hime|lt=Nunakiiri-hime no Mikoto|ja|渟名城入姫命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nunakiiri-hime no Mikoto|qq=}} was the most suitable for this role.
== Genealogy == Kushiukanushi no Mikoto is identified as the son of {{ill|Kamikikatsu no Mikoto|ja|神聞勝命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamikikatsu no Mikoto|1=Kamikikikatsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q106106971}} and the father of {{ill|Kuninazu no Ōkashima no Mikoto|ja|国摩大鹿島命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuninazu no Ōkashima no Mikoto|qq=}} according to genealogical records.<ref>『[[:en:Sonpi Bunmyaku|Sonpi Bunmyaku]]』</ref>

== Genealogy == Kushiukanushi no Mikoto is identified as the son of {{ill|Kamikikatsu no Mikoto|ja|神聞勝命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamikikatsu no Mikoto|1=Kamikikikatsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q106106971}} and the father of {{ill|Kuninazu no Ōkashima no Mikoto|ja|国摩大鹿島命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuninazu no Ōkashima no Mikoto|qq=}} according to genealogical records.<ref>『[[:en:Sonpi Bunmyaku|Sonpi Bunmyaku]]』</ref>
== References == {{Reflist}}
== Related Articles == *[[:en:Radical 25|Radical 25]] *{{ill|Urabe clan|lt=Urabe clan|ja|卜部氏|en|draft:Yoshida family|simple|User:Immanuelle/Urabe_clan|fr|clan Urabe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Urabe clan|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:久志宇賀主命]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:久志宇賀主命]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:久志宇賀主命]] {{Infobox person|gender={{ill|male|WD=Q6581097|1=Male (gender)}}|spouse={{ill|Q106107729|WD=Q106107729|1=Ominakuchi-hime}}|children={{ill|Kuninazu no oukashima|WD=Q99517269|1=Kuninazu no Ōkashima no Mikoto}}; {{ill|Q106107899|WD=Q106107899|1=Inatsu-hime no Mikoto}}|father={{ill|Kamikikikatsu|WD=Q106106971|1=Kamikikikatsu}}|mother={{ill|Q106107417|WD=Q106107417|1=Mikaka-hime no Mikoto}}}} {{Infobox noble | name = Kushiukanushi no Mikoto | image = | image_size = | caption = | era = [[Kofun period]] | birth_date = Unknown | death_date = Unknown | other_names = Sagayuushi no Mikoto, Nakatomi no Muraji no Sagayuushi | honorary_title = | deity_name = | posthumous_name = | burial_place = | Rank = | lord = [[Emperor Suinin]] | clan = {{ill|Nakatomi clan|en|Nakatomi clan|WD=Q1198447|lt=Nakatomi clan|1=Nakatomi clan}} | parents = Father: {{ill|Kamikikatsu no Mikoto|ja|神聞勝命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamikikatsu no Mikoto|1=Kamikikikatsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q106106971}} | children = {{ill|Kuninazu no Ōkashima no Mikoto|ja|国摩大鹿島命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuninazu no Ōkashima no Mikoto|qq=}} }}
'''Kushiukanushi no Mikoto''' (久志宇賀主命) was an ancient Japanese noble and an ancestor of the {{ill|Nakatomi clan|en|Nakatomi clan|WD=Q1198447|lt=Nakatomi clan|1=Nakatomi clan}}.
== Overview == In the *{{ill|Nihon Shoki|en|Nihon Shoki|WD=Q813935|lt=Nihon Shoki|1=Nihon Shoki}}*, during the reign of {{ill|Emperor Suinin|en|Emperor Suinin|WD=Q314850|lt=Emperor Suinin|1=Emperor Suinin}}, an entry in the 26th year of the emperor’s reign notes that the emperor consulted Kushiukanushi no Mikoto (referred to as the ancestor of the Nakatomi clan) about whom should conduct the worship of {{ill|Yamato Okunitama|en|Yamato Okunitama|WD=Q11387080|lt=Ōyamato no Ōkami|1=Yamato Okunitama}}. The divination revealed that {{ill|Nunaki-iri-hime|lt=Nunaki-iri-hime|lt=Nunakiiri-hime no Mikoto|ja|渟名城入姫命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nunakiiri-hime no Mikoto|qq=}} was the most suitable for this role.
== Genealogy == Kushiukanushi no Mikoto is identified as the son of {{ill|Kamikikatsu no Mikoto|ja|神聞勝命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamikikatsu no Mikoto|1=Kamikikikatsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q106106971}} and the father of {{ill|Kuninazu no Ōkashima no Mikoto|ja|国摩大鹿島命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuninazu no Ōkashima no Mikoto|qq=}} according to genealogical records.<ref>『{{ill|Sonpi Bunmyaku|en|Sonpi Bunmyaku|WD=Q1704738|lt=Sonpi Bunmyaku|1=Sonpi Bunmyaku}}』</ref>
== References == {{Reflist}}
== Related Articles == *{{ill|Radical 25|en|Radical 25|WD=Q94724|lt=Radical 25|1=Radical 25}} *{{ill|Urabe clan|lt=Urabe clan|ja|卜部氏|en|draft:Yoshida family|simple|User:Immanuelle/Urabe_clan|fr|clan Urabe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Urabe clan|qq=}}
{{translated page|ja|久志宇賀主命|version=91088283|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[ja:久志宇賀主命]]

'''Kushiukanushi no Mikoto''' (久志宇賀主命) was an ancient Japanese noble and an ancestor of the {{ill|Nakatomi clan|en|Nakatomi clan|WD=Q1198447|lt=Nakatomi clan|1=Nakatomi clan}}.

The divination revealed that {{ill|Nunaki-iri-hime|lt=Nunaki-iri-hime|lt=Nunakiiri-hime no Mikoto|ja|渟名城入姫命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nunakiiri-hime no Mikoto|qq=}} was the most suitable for this role.
